BlackArch Linux
Penetration Testing Distribution

Over 2800 tools

Tools

Hacking Tools List

  1. Home
  2. Tools
Information

Every package of the BlackArch Linux repository is listed in the following table. If you don't find your needed tool in this list simply open an issue or better do a pull request for the tool you want to be in our repository. We are fast at packaging and releasing tools.


Tool count: 2859

BlackArch Linux Complete Tools List
Name Version Description Category Website

adaptix-c2 727.6605760 Extensible post-exploitation and adversarial emulation framework. blackarch-exploitation

yasuo 121.994dcb1 A ruby script that scans for vulnerable & exploitable 3rd-party web applications on a network. blackarch-webapp
yate-bts 6.1.0 An open source GSM Base Station software. blackarch-radio
yawast 0.12.1 The YAWAST Antecedent Web Application Security Toolkit. blackarch-webapp
yay 12.5.7 Yet another yogurt. Pacman wrapper and AUR helper written in go. blackarch-misc
ycrawler 0.1 A web crawler that is useful for grabbing all user supplied input related to a given website and will save the output. It has proxy and log file support. blackarch-webapp
yersinia 0.8.2 A network tool designed to take advantage of some weakness in different network protocols. blackarch-networking
yeti 3428.2d139994 A platform meant to organize observables, indicators of compromise, TTPs, and knowledge on threats in a single, unified repository. blackarch-defensive
yinjector 0.1 A MySQL injection penetration tool. It has multiple features, proxy support, and multiple exploitation methods. blackarch-exploitation
ysoserial 0.0.6 A proof-of-concept tool for generating payloads that exploit unsafe Java object deserialization. blackarch-webapp
zackattack 5.1f96c14 A new tool set to do NTLM Authentication relaying unlike any other tool currently out there. blackarch-networking
zarn 0.0.9.r125.g291124c A lightweight static security analysis tool for modern Perl Apps. blackarch-code-audit
zarp 0.1.8 A network attack tool centered around the exploitation of local networks. blackarch-exploitation
zdns v2.0.5.r36.g0989959 Fast CLI DNS Lookup Tool. blackarch-networking
zeek v9.0.0.dev.r62.gefac5b8 A powerful network analysis framework that is much different from the typical IDS you may know. blackarch-networking
zeek-aux 782.df8cb9d Handy auxiliary programs related to the use of the Zeek Network Security Monitor. blackarch-networking
zelos 272.506554d A comprehensive binary emulation and instrumentation platform. blackarch-binary
zeratool 48.3fb3262 Automatic Exploit Generation (AEG) and remote flag capture for exploitable CTF problems. blackarch-exploitation
zerowine 0.0.2 Malware Analysis Tool - research project to dynamically analyze the behavior of malware blackarch-malware
zeus 111.97db152 AWS Auditing & Hardening Tool. blackarch-defensive
zeus-scanner 414.21b8756 Advanced dork searching utility. blackarch-recon
zgrab 804.59a517f Grab banners (optionally over TLS). blackarch-recon
zgrab2 v1.0.0.r33.gd421102 Fast Application Layer Scanner. blackarch-fingerprint
zipdump 0.0.21 ZIP dump utility. blackarch-forensic
zipexec 19.f8d661f A unique technique to execute binaries from a password protected zip. blackarch-crypto
zirikatu 7.afe1d9c Fud Payload generator script. blackarch-exploitation
zizzania 124.8f2062f Automated DeAuth attack. blackarch-wireless
zsteg v0.2.14.r0.gb75b578 Detect stegano-hidden data in PNG and BMP. blackarch-stego
zulu 0.1 A light weight 802.11 wireless frame generation tool to enable fast and easy debugging and probing of 802.11 networks. blackarch-cracker
zulucrypt 7.1.0 Front end to cryptsetup and tcplay and it allows easy management of encrypted block devices. blackarch-crypto
zykeys 0.1 Demonstrates how default wireless settings are derived on some models of ZyXEL routers. blackarch-wireless

BlackArch Linux 2013-2026
